name: Neeko
playstyleSummary: Neeko is a mage who can disguise herself as an ally or another unit to confuse enemies, then punishes anyone who gets too close with area damage. She feels sneaky and a bit trickster-ish - much of her power comes from making opponents second-guess who's actually standing in front of them before she bursts them down.
strengths: Inherent Glamour's disguise lets her scout and bait enemies into bad decisions
Pop Blossom is a strong teamfight engage, especially when its telegraph is hidden by disguise
Tangle-Barbs punishes enemies who group up near minions
Blooming Burst rewards good positioning with a second hit for extra damage
weaknesses: Disguise breaks easily from crowd control, casting a damaging spell, or taking enough damage
Fairly squishy and easy to kill once revealed
Her disguise tricks become less effective once enemies learn to watch for them
Relies on landing skillshots to deal real damage

abilities.name: Inherent Glamour
abilities.howToUseIt: Disguise yourself as an ally or another unit to confuse or bait enemies - remember that crowd control, casting a damaging spell, or taking too much damage will break the disguise, so use it carefully.

abilities.name: Blooming Burst
abilities.howToUseIt: Throw this at an enemy, and it detonates again if it hits a champion or kills something - line it up so both hits land on the same target for double the damage.

abilities.name: Shapesplitter
abilities.howToUseIt: Every third attack deals bonus damage passively, and you can send a clone in a direction to fake out enemies, recasting to redirect it mid-flight.

abilities.name: Tangle-Barbs
abilities.howToUseIt: Aim this through multiple enemies or minions - it grows bigger, faster, and lasts longer each time it kills something or passes through a champion, so a wide-open line makes it far more dangerous.

abilities.name: Pop Blossom
abilities.howToUseIt: Use this while disguised so the warning telegraph is hidden, catching enemies off guard with the knock-up and stun when you land.

earlyGamePlan: Poke with Blooming Burst when the enemy steps up to farm, aiming to hit them directly for the double-hit bonus. Use your disguise sparingly early - save it for moments where faking out the enemy actually matters, since overusing it teaches them to stop falling for it.
quickTips: Line up Tangle-Barbs through as many minions or champions as possible to make it bigger and longer-lasting.
Cast Pop Blossom while disguised to hide the telegraph and catch enemies by surprise.
Remember your disguise breaks if you take crowd control, cast a damaging spell, or take enough damage.
Aim Blooming Burst to land both hits on the same champion for maximum damage.
Use Shapesplitter's clone to scout a brush or bait an enemy into revealing themselves.
whatToExpect: Neeko can disguise herself as an ally or minion to sneak up on you, so be a little cautious around units that could actually be her. Watch for a hidden Pop Blossom setting up a knock-up and stun in a teamfight, and remember that focusing damage onto her or landing crowd control on her breaks her disguise immediately.

glossary.definition: Appearing as another unit to hide your identity - a mechanic Neeko uses to confuse enemies until it's broken.
A visible warning or animation that reveals an ability is about to happen, giving enemies a chance to react.
Effects like stuns, roots, or slows that limit an enemy's ability to move or act.
Chip damage traded from range to wear enemies down before a real fight.
Bushes on the map that hide any unit standing inside them from enemies outside.
